summary.strategy_lab_contract: Strategy Lab must prioritize nearest_deployable_rows and show OOS/model gate failures separately from current-live/support blockers; no live automation button is exposed from this research gate.
summary.execution_contract: current-live blocker / unsupported support route keeps buy/add exposure fail-closed; reduce/sell diagnostics remain available
summary.api_contract: `/api/models/leaderboard.high_conviction_topk` exposes risk_qualified_count, runtime_blocked_candidate_count, nearest_deployable_rows, gate_failures/model_gate_failures/live_gate_failures, and fail-closed status.
summary.strategy_lab_surface: Strategy Lab 高信心 OOS Top-K Gate panel renders walk-forward top-k OOS ROI, win_rate, max_drawdown, profit_factor, worst_fold, trade_count, deployable verdict, and gate failures
summary.risk_first_sort_contract: deployment candidates are sorted by deployable/risk-qualified/runtime-blocked OOS-pass status before ROI, so high ROI rows with max_drawdown_too_high or worst_fold_negative cannot outrank cleaner nearest-deployable rows.

Strategy Lab 高信心 OOS Top-K Gate panel and /api/models/leaderboard.high_conviction_topk now surface walk-forward top-k OOS matrix while current-live/support blockers keep deployability fail-closed

source venv/bin/activate && python -m pytest tests/test_topk_walkforward_precision.py -k nearest_deployable -q && python -m pytest tests/test_model_leaderboard.py -k high_conviction_topk -q && python -m pytest tests/test_frontend_decision_contract.py -k high_conviction_topk_gate_contract -q

issues.title: live predictor decision-quality contract is runtime-blocked by recent pathology, a toxic exact live lane, or a severe narrowed pathology lane
issues.action: 把 hb_predict_probe 納入每輪 heartbeat 驗證，對 exact live lane、當前 calibration scope 與 worst narrowed scope 做 root-cause drill-down；優先檢查 exact lane 是否仍是 ALLOW 但 canonical true-negative share 已偏高，並交叉比對 recent same-scope / narrowed-scope 4H shifts、scope selection、與 execution guardrail 是否只是正確地把壞 pocket 擋下。 live_scope=global, regime=bear/CAUTION, label=D, sample_size=200, window=100, alerts=['label_imbalance'], expected_win_rate=0.18, expected_pnl=-0.0069, expected_quality=-0.1311, layers=1→0, top_shifts=feat_4h_dist_swing_low(1.389→0.0715)/feat_4h_dist_bb_lower(1.8179→0.8922)/feat_4h_bb_pct_b(0.6138→0.2974), exact_live_lane=(rows=0,wr=None,q=None,dd=None,tuw=None), scope_brief=regime_label+regime_gate+entry_quality_label:rows=0|wr=None|q=None|alerts=['no_rows']; regime_gate+entry_quality_label:rows=11|wr=0.6364|q=0.3578|dom=chop|CAUTION@1.0|spillover=chop|CAUTION:rows=11,wr=0.6364,q=0.3578; regime_label+entry_quality_label:rows=0|wr=None|q=None|alerts=['no_rows']; entry_quality_label:rows=11|wr=0.6364|q=0.3578|dom=chop|CAUTION@1.0|spillover=chop|CAUTION:rows=11,wr=0.6364,q=0.3578
